allowed_phrases: STWM outperforms controlled slot-AR trace-unit proxy
STWM outperforms DINOv2 latent dynamics proxy
Official SlotFormer/DINO-WM adaptation remains future work or appendix diagnostic if not completed.

dino_wm_like_latent_dynamics_proxy.adaptation_changes: Native latent dynamics proxy using existing frozen semantic/visual cache; official DINO-WM repo/code/checkpoint/feature protocol not used.
dino_wm_like_latent_dynamics_proxy.allowed_claim: STWM can be compared against a DINOv2/pretrained-feature latent dynamics proxy.
dino_wm_like_latent_dynamics_proxy.forbidden_claim: Cannot claim beating official DINO-WM or say DINO-WM baseline completed.

semantic_only_memory_transition.adaptation_changes: Native STWM-FSTF same-output semantic-only transition; no trace rollout hidden input.
semantic_only_memory_transition.allowed_claim: Controlled semantic-only same-output ablation under the STWM-FSTF protocol.
semantic_only_memory_transition.forbidden_claim: Do not present as evidence against official object-centric dynamics methods.

slotformer_like_trace_unit_dynamics.adaptation_changes: Native autoregressive trace-unit slot proxy inspired by object-slot dynamics; official SlotFormer repo/code/checkpoint not used.
slotformer_like_trace_unit_dynamics.allowed_claim: STWM can be compared against a controlled slot-AR trace-unit proxy.
slotformer_like_trace_unit_dynamics.forbidden_claim: Cannot claim beating official SlotFormer or say SlotFormer baseline completed.

trace_only_ar_transformer.adaptation_changes: Native STWM-FSTF same-output trace-only AR Transformer; no official external repo.
trace_only_ar_transformer.allowed_claim: Controlled trace-only same-output ablation under the STWM-FSTF protocol.
trace_only_ar_transformer.forbidden_claim: Do not present as an official external trajectory/world-model implementation.

trace_semantic_transformer.adaptation_changes: Native plain Transformer over trace rollout features plus observed semantic memory; no copy-gated residual structure.
trace_semantic_transformer.allowed_claim: Controlled same-output plain trace+semantic Transformer comparison.
trace_semantic_transformer.forbidden_claim: Do not describe as an official SlotFormer/DINO-WM baseline.
